entries.title: AntigravityQuotaSource token reading has SQL injection vulnerability
cost-rank.test.mjs imports from compiled dist/ instead of source
$ARGUMENTS variable uses Claude Code convention in Gemini/Antigravity command
a8.test.ts healthy-before-degraded test asserts incorrect expectation
advanceAudit forced executor path bypasses drain but still emits staleness record
advanceHostRolling holds the session file lock across the whole accept lifecycle, exceeding the lock's 10s acquire timeout and 30s stale-steal window
advanceRollingPause uses strandedIds parameter but passes next.stranded_node_ids to terminal
applyEdgeReasoning uses byEndpoints map which only stores first edge per (from,to) pair
Audit and remediation installers duplicate the same host framework
audit-cli-invariants.test.mjs tests INV-audit-cli-02 but only verifies fallthrough behavior, not the null guard fix
audit-code-completion.test.mjs captureConsoleLog overrides console.log/console.warn/process.stderr.write globally - test pollution risk
audit-code-completion.test.mjs withEnvParity mutates global process.env.CLAUDECODE - potential test pollution
Base-branch mutual exclusion is time-bounded, not ownership-bounded: unbounded verify work runs inside a non-renewed, 30s-stealable, 10s-timeout file lock
entries.rationale: Finding carried no evidence and was excluded from the plan.

entries.title: brokeredDispatch.ts fitWaveToBudget uses resolveContextBudget which subtracts output_tokens from context_tokens, but output_tokens is the model's max output cap, not reserved output
buildFileAnchorSummary assigns end_line to nested symbols incorrectly
Cascading failure risk - test dependencies on external provider launches
Claim lease leaked on accept-node failure, permanently stranding nodes
claimMany same-poolId re-grant rotates a live peer's ownerToken, allowing double execution within one run
claimRegistry.claimMany re-grants own pool's live claims without checking staleness
cli-dispatcher.test.mjs imports the CLI from dist/, passing on stale builds
Concurrency tests use setTimeout for timing-dependent assertions
Configured worker provider is misclassified as the conversation host
CP-NODE-3 state-transition test acts as drift guard for state machine
Cycle detection over the union of heterogeneous edge relations produces confidently-worded phantom findings in the product's own output
entries.rationale: Finding carried no evidence and was excluded from the plan.

entries.title: Deep nesting in acceptNode.ts acceptNodeWorktreeLocked function
Deep nesting in mergeImplementResultsIntoState (marshal.ts)
deliverable-paths-single-source.test.mjs is a drift guard test policing duplicated paths
Dependency cycle: 5 modules
entries.rationale: Finding carried no evidence and was excluded from the plan.

entries.title: dependencyMap ARTIFACT_DEPENDS_ON_MAP missing dependency for audit_tasks on coverage_matrix
deriveObligationLedger classifies obligations using baseline from finalizedModuleContracts which includes the module being processed
designReviewPrompt.ts: Multiple prompt rendering functions share duplicated structure
dispatch.host_pause handling doesn't clear paused state when wall clears
dispatch/validate.mjs couples the dispatch scripts to a compiled dist/ path
Drift guard test pattern: test enforces sync between two copies of logic that should be single-sourced
Drift guard tests (INV-shared-tests-03 through 07) are themselves duplicated logic that should be parameterized
driveRollingAuditDispatch swallows ingestion errors and returns null ingest
Dual-source dependency map (TypeScript + Markdown) kept in sync by tests instead of single-sourced
Duplicated 'large file packet' detection and handling logic across three files
Duplicated git repository initialization logic in dispatch-worktree.test.ts
Duplicated loader workflow and capability handshake between audit-code and remediate-code
Duplicated smoke test infrastructure between linked and packaged variants
Duplicated stable stringify implementation
Duplicated test helper functions across test files
Duplicated test infrastructure across audit test files
Duplicated test infrastructure for git repo setup across test files
Entire test file is a drift guard for duplicated obligation-abstraction interface
Error diagnostic in acceptNodeWorktree omits critical context fields
Error reporting lacks contextual metadata for debugging
Error reporting lacks contextual metadata in verify/merge failures
Excessive function length in close.ts - runClosePhase spans 400+ lines
Excessive function length in evaluateContractPipelineCrossGates (contractPipelineGates.ts)

Excessive function length in prepareDispatchArtifacts (400+ lines)

Excessive test file size: dispatch-worktree.test.ts at 953 lines
executorRunners.ts: EXECUTOR_RUNNERS object has 25 entries with inconsistent argument adaptation patterns
